notes: Polished Calendar event date/time UX into compact picker cards.
Removed the tall stepper block that made the dialog feel crowded.
Added clearer date and time quick actions without long dropdown menus.
Reduced dialog height pressure so the note box and action buttons stay visible.
Calendar event save still uses YYYY-MM-DD and HH:MM values.
No Work folder, settings, or cache behavior is changed.
No Setup wizard is shown during in-app silent updates and SA CHECK stays closed after update.
No user Work folders, settings, or cache are cleared by this update.
